description: A piece of logic attached to a tag and driven by a trigger. The state-machine runner (guild/web/scripts/lib/state_machine.py) loads every Script instance, matches events against its trigger, and invokes the referenced Tool UDT through run_with_logger. Equivalent to Ignition Tag Change Scripts + Gateway Events.

trigger.description: Trigger discriminator. Supported kinds: on_transition, on_change, on_interval, on_boot

condition.description: Optional gate expression (e.g. `branch==main`) evaluated against event context. If false, the script is skipped.

action.description: What to run when the trigger fires. Points at a Tool UDT.

bound_tag.description: Tag the script listens on; mirrors parameters.trigger.tag

bound_tool.description: Tool the script invokes; mirrors parameters.action.tool_id
